_comment: Services page content. Edit here — no code changes needed.

hero.label: What We Do
hero.sub: Every format we run, we own end-to-end — site, structure, printing, installation, lighting, and proof.

items.title: Billboards & Hoardings
items.desc: Premium large-format sites on Maharashtra's busiest highways and city junctions — engineered steel, front-lit, back-lit, and monumental.

items.title: Digital LED Screens
items.desc: Large-format outdoor LED in Mumbai, Pune, and Nagpur city centres — dayparted slots, live creative swaps, programmatic booking.

items.title: Transit Media
items.desc: Bus wraps, auto hoods, and metro panels moving through every artery of the state — your brand doing the commute with your customers.

items.title: Airport & Mall Media
items.desc: Captive-audience placements inside Pune and Nagpur airports and Maharashtra's highest-footfall malls — dwell time you can't buy on a highway.

items.title: Brand Activations
items.desc: Street-level events, mall takeovers, and launch spectacles with permits, fabrication, staffing, and crowd logistics handled in-house.

items.title: Printing & Fabrication
items.desc: Our own flex printing and steel fabrication units — which is why a 9-city campaign goes live in 72 hours, not three weeks.

cta.heading: Not sure which format fits?
cta.sub: Send us the brief — we'll map it to the sites that will actually move the needle.
